citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Illustrate how a computer can represent the playing of a game such as tic-tac-toe or nim by drawing the linear sequence of board positions produced by the players' moves.
